name: Ria Money Transfer - JDs7
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is an international remittance service enabling money transfers to 190+ countries through 600,000+ locations globally, with online, mobile, and in-person send options.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer has operated for over 35 years as a money remittance provider, establishing itself as a global player in international money transfers. The company facilitates sending and receiving funds across 190+ countries and territories through partnerships with local agents and financial institutions.

Ria offers multiple send methods: online transfers, mobile app-based sending, in-person cash payments at agent locations, and WhatsApp integration for select countries. Receivers can collect funds via cash pickup at 600,000+ locations, bank deposit, digital wallets, home delivery, or ATM withdrawal. The service supports over 100 currencies and advertises competitive exchange rates. Ria claims to have processed over one billion safe transfers historically.

The company differentiates itself through its extensive agent network (600,000+ payout locations), multi-channel sending options including WhatsApp money transfers, mobile app functionality with real-time tracking, and competitive first-transfer promotions. They also leverage brand partnerships, such as their sponsorship of the Mexican National Team, to build consumer trust.

While Ria provides reliable international remittance services with transparent pricing (showing upfront fees like $1.99 USD on sample transfers), the platform is fundamentally a money transfer service rather than a financial institution. Users should understand this is optimized for international remittances to family and friends, not a replacement for banking services. The 100% satisfaction guarantee and high app ratings (4.9/5 on iOS, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot) suggest consistent user satisfaction, though specific pricing varies by corridor and payment method.
pros: Extensive global reach: 600,000+ cash pickup locations across 190+ countries
Multiple send methods: online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp integration
Multiple receive options: cash pickup, bank deposit, digital wallet, home delivery, ATM withdrawal
Supports 100+ currencies with competitive exchange rates
Real-time transfer tracking available through website and mobile app
35+ year track record with over 1 billion transfers processed
Transparent upfront pricing displayed before confirmation
High user ratings: 4.9/5 on iOS, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot with 249k+ reviews
cons: Transfer fees apply (e.g., $1.99 USD shown on sample, though fees vary by corridor)
Limited to international remittances; not a banking or deposit-taking institution
WhatsApp money transfer limited to select countries only
Exchange rates subject to market fluctuations and may not be optimal for all currency pairs
Requires registration/login to send money, creating account setup friction
best_for: Immigrants and expats sending money regularly to family in 190+ countries
Individuals needing cash pickup options at widespread agent networks
Users seeking multi-channel flexibility (online, app, in-person, WhatsApp)
People transferring to Mexico and Latin America with promotional first-transfer rates
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for individuals regularly sending money internationally to family and friends across 190+ countries who value convenience, extensive payout options, and competitive rates. The primary caveat is that this is a remittance service, not a financial institution—it excels at facilitating one-way international transfers but does not offer banking, deposit, or credit products.
services: In-person cash payment at agent locations

places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 6506 Decker Ln, Austin, TX 78724, USA
